name: Inconel Bar
summary: Nickel-chromium alloy bars for oxidation resistance, heat strength, and corrosion resistance.

name: Hastelloy Bar
summary: Nickel-molybdenum and nickel-chromium-molybdenum alloy bars for aggressive chemical environments.

name: Incoloy Bar
summary: Nickel-iron-chromium alloy bars for heat treatment, petrochemical, and industrial equipment.

name: Monel Bar
summary: Nickel-copper alloy bars for seawater, marine, pump, valve, and chemical processing applications.

name: Pure Nickel Bar
summary: Commercially pure nickel bars such as Nickel 200 and Nickel 201 for corrosion and electrical applications.

name: Nimonic Bar
summary: High-temperature nickel superalloy bars for turbine, fastener, combustion, and heat-resistant service.

name: Invar Bar
summary: Low-expansion nickel-iron alloy bars for precision tooling, molds, electronics, and dimensional stability.
